task_completion.description: Filter or search the employee list to identify all employees with the 'Consultant' tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo employee dashboard search bar contains 'Consultant' or a filter is applied, displaying the affected employees (Jeffrey Kelly and Anita Oliver).
The employee profile page for Jeffrey Kelly is visible. (Note: The agent may choose to process Anita Oliver first, which is acceptable).

task_completion.description: Replace the 'Consultant' tag with 'Contractor' for Jeffrey Kelly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jeffrey Kelly's profile shows the newly created 'Contractor' tag in the Tags field and does NOT show the 'Consultant' tag. The changes must be saved.
The employee profile page for Anita Oliver is visible.

task_completion.description: Replace the 'Consultant' tag with 'Contractor' for Anita Oliver.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Anita Oliver's profile shows the 'Contractor' tag in the Tags field and does NOT show the 'Consultant' tag. The changes must be saved.

task_completion.description: Verify that no employees are left with the 'Consultant' tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search or filter for 'Consultant' in the employee list yields no employee records, OR the 'Consultant' tag is shown being deleted from the system configuration.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web UI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands, API calls, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the 'Contractor' tag was genuinely created in the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Contractor' tag appears as a standard Odoo UI element (e.g., a colored pill in the Tags dropdown/field), not just text typed into an unrelated field or edited via browser developer tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually saved the profile changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save' button is clicked or the employee form transitions from 'Edit' mode to read-only mode after updating the tags for the employees.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target employees who currently have the 'Consultant' tag are Jeffrey Kelly and Anita Oliver. The old tag is 'Consultant' and the new tag to be created and assigned is 'Contractor'. Replacing the tag for these two specific employees satisfies the requirement for all employees in the system.
